outcome: Exactly four canonical TaxKit runbooks, one authority model, one strict machine contract, an Effect-native non-executing validator, adversarial fixtures, maintenance routing and package-safe HGI-203 Schema consumption are implemented for independent acceptance.

authority.localSliceAuthority: Repository writes and local/read-only verification only; no documented consequential operation is authorized by this candidate.

validator.observedPostcondition: Four runbooks and ten declared command contracts passed with zero violations and zero executed operations.
validator.failurePostcondition: A subprocess pre-receipt fixture exited 1 with one bounded recovery line, no stack, and no fixture or home path.

fixtures: valid exact inventory including substantive final section
extra runbook file and index row

impactLedger.evidence: No calculator or rules source, Schema, behavior or public contract changed.
impactLedger.acceptance: Repository verification preserves their existing gates.
impactLedger.limitation: This slice makes no calculator-correctness claim.

impactLedger.class: SDK exports, examples and packed consumer
impactLedger.evidence: The packed-consumer runbook routes existing @taxkit/sdk commands and README without changing SDK source or exports.
impactLedger.acceptance: Declared commands are resolved from the SDK package manifest and full verification preserves package checks.
impactLedger.limitation: No registry or external consumer was observed.

impactLedger.evidence: No API schema, OpenAPI source/snapshot, MDX, navigation, Fumadocs source or runtime file changed.
impactLedger.acceptance: Documentation policy and full repository verification remain the preservation gates.
impactLedger.limitation: No API, publication, SSR/hydration or public availability claim is made.

impactLedger.evidence: @taxkit/scripts now exposes only three owning HGI-203 Schemas through @taxkit/scripts/release-readiness with bun/source/types/default conditions; its README and one patch Changeset describe the boundary.
impactLedger.acceptance: Direct Bun export fixture, package typecheck/build, Knip and frozen install.
impactLedger.limitation: No package was versioned or published.

impactLedger.evidence: AGENTS.md and docs/README.md route the exact index/authority owner; tooling and versioning standards route checks and authority without copying procedures. Architecture remains unchanged because no architecture boundary changed.
impactLedger.limitation: Routes do not establish operational success.

impactLedger.class: commands, runbooks, authority and release proof
impactLedger.evidence: Exactly four procedure owners, one authority model, one strict sidecar and check:runbooks consume the accepted HGI-203 graph without copying its Schemas or running commands.
impactLedger.acceptance: Bounded validator receipt and eighteen positive/adversarial focused scenarios.
impactLedger.limitation: Static inspection proves no Git, version, hosted-release, registry, deployment, provider or recovery state.

impactLedger.evidence: The repo-local docs-maintainer skill and TaxKit profile route operation changes to the canonical index, sidecar, authority model and check without duplicating steps.
impactLedger.acceptance: bun run test:skills and repository path policy.
impactLedger.limitation: The skill teaches maintenance judgment and grants no operation authority.

impactLedger.evidence: Oxlint admits only the exact new decode, encode, runtime, console and Bun boundaries; fixtures exercise structural, semantic, authority, handoff, prose-divergence and bounded-output failures.
impactLedger.acceptance: lint, check:docs:types, focused documentation tests and full verification.
impactLedger.limitation: Tests observe local deterministic policy only.

impactLedger.class: active SPEC, execution plan and evidence index
impactLedger.evidence: The TaxKit SPEC and active plan mark HGI-204 candidate pending independent acceptance; the audit index routes this candidate.
impactLedger.acceptance: Task state and evidence route change together; final completion waits for independent acceptance and Git receipt.
impactLedger.limitation: Candidate status is not acceptance or completion.

impactLedger.evidence: check:runbooks joins local verification, but no workflow or continuous authority is added; HGI-205 remains the explicit successor.
impactLedger.acceptance: Local full verification must pass before independent review.
impactLedger.limitation: No CI-provider run or continuous automation state is claimed.

verification.postcondition: 17 strict policy fixtures passed through the public release-readiness Schema export path, including exact allowed arguments and rejected missing/wrong prefixes.
35 documentation tests passed, including the bounded subprocess failure fixture.

verification.command: bun run --filter=@taxkit/scripts check-types && bun run --filter=@taxkit/scripts build
verification.postcondition: The narrow subpath resolves and emits declarations/JavaScript at the documented build paths.
The only new lock importer edge is the root workspace dependency on @taxkit/scripts.

verification.command: bun run check:docs && bun run check:repository-paths && bun run knip && bun run knip:production && bun run verification && git diff --check
verification.postcondition: Documentation policy passed across 617 files, repository-path policy passed across 603 tracked files, both Knip graphs passed, formatting/lint/skills/runbook/effect-language-service gates passed, and 23/23 workspace typecheck tasks completed.

rollback: Revert the future HGI-204 semantic commit while retaining accepted HGI-203 evidence and this candidate/validation provenance; remove the local validator and routes together so no stale command remains.
limitations: The validator inspects repository-local structure, prose and accepted evidence only; it deliberately executes none of the documented commands.
The bounded ignored receipt is non-authoritative and is not clean-clone accepted evidence.
Independent fresh-context acceptance and exact Git publication/readback remain pending.
nonClaims: No version change, commit from a runbook, push, tag, hosted release, registry publication, deployment, provider access, public-site mutation or recovery mutation occurred.
Local tests do not establish external consumers, registry state, deployment state, SSR/hydration or public availability.
